description:
Kling V2.6 video generation with sound and voice support.

Modes determined by inputs:
- Text-to-video: prompt only
- Image-to-video: prompt + image (first frame)
- Start/end frame: prompt + image + end_image (pro only, no audio)
- Voice control: prompt with <<<voice_1>>> + image + voice_id (pro only)

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video content. For voice control, include <<<voice_1>>> where the character speaks. Max 2500 chars.
examples: Ocean waves crashing on rocky shore at golden hour
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: Start frame image for image-to-video. Formats: jpg, jpeg, png. Max 10MB, min 300px.
image.title: Image

end_image.description: End frame image (pro mode only, disables audio). Requires image to be set.
end_image.title: End Image

voice_id.description: Voice ID for voice-driven animation (pro mode only). Use <<<voice_1>>> in prompt to mark speech.
voice_id.title: Voice Id

mode.description: Generation mode. 'pro' for higher quality + sound/voice support, 'std' for faster/cheaper (no audio in std).

sound.description: Generate synchronized audio. Only works in pro mode. Disabled when using start/end frames.
sound.title: Sound

negative_prompt.description: What to avoid in the video. Max 2500 chars. Note: not supported on V2.x models.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

title: AppInput
